name: Message Scroller
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Message Scroller with model-owned pinned/unread state, explicit scroll commands, chat viewport slots, deterministic examples, and local Message/Bubble/Input Group/Empty composition.

registry.reason: Message Scroller examples render assistant and user content in local Bubble helpers.
The scroll affordance and load-history control compose the local Button item.
Examples preserve the origin framed chat demo with local Card helpers.
The empty conversation example composes the local Empty item.
The demo composer uses the local Input Group item.
Unread status examples use the local Marker item.
Message Scroller items wrap local Message rows.
Message Scroller uses local class canonicalization.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Command, Dom, message, and struct APIs for Foldkit-native state and side effects.
Provides Effect Schema, Match, and Effect helpers for typed contracts and commands.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin streaming demos are represented by deterministic static fixtures.
Installable source uses Foldkit model/update/commands instead of React primitive hooks.
Origin icons are replaced by local inline SVGs.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin toast usage is not required for deterministic Message Scroller fixtures.

examples.title: MessageScrollerDemo
examples.description: Basic pinned chat viewport with deterministic turns and composer.
examples.distinguishes: Basic pinned chat viewport with deterministic turns and composer.

examples.title: MessageScrollerScrollable
examples.description: Unpinned reader state with unread marker and active scroll button.
examples.distinguishes: Unpinned reader state with unread marker and active scroll button.

examples.title: MessageScrollerLoadHistory
examples.description: Previous context and start-direction scroll affordance.
examples.distinguishes: Previous context and start-direction scroll affordance.

examples.title: MessageScrollerOpeningPosition
examples.description: Opening-position fixture with the most recent exchange in view.
examples.distinguishes: Opening-position fixture with the most recent exchange in view.

examples.title: MessageScrollerEmpty
examples.description: Empty conversation state using local Empty helpers.
examples.distinguishes: Empty conversation state using local Empty helpers.

deviations.summary: Message Scroller replaces React primitive hooks, AI streaming, animation helpers, sonner, and lucide-react with Foldkit state, explicit commands, deterministic fixtures, and inline SVGs.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source cannot depend on React interop, AI SDK network behavior, or animation runtime. The local item preserves origin slots and user-visible states while keeping scroll side effects in commands.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Message Scroller with model-owned pinned/unread state, explicit scroll commands, chat viewport slots, deterministic examples, and local Message/Bubble/Input Group/Empty composition.
